message:
fix(test): unify a11y lock between unit and integration tests (bd-2t0h)

Integration tests were using a local a11y_lock() that didn't coordinate with
GLOBAL_A11Y_LOCK in theme.rs, causing potential race conditions when running
unit tests and integration tests in parallel.

Changes:
- Add test-support feature to Cargo.toml for exposing test infrastructure
- Remove #[cfg(test)] gates from theme.rs lock functions so they work in all
  contexts (auto-acquire lock when not already held)
- Update a11y_snapshots.rs to use ScopedA11yLock from theme.rs instead of
  local lock implementation
- Remove redundant set_motion_scale() and set_large_text() calls (now handled
  by ScopedA11yLock)

All tests pass with unified lock infrastructure.

Based on fix by EmeraldBarn.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -42,6 +42,8 @@ unicode-width = "0.2.2"
 debug-render = []
 caps-probe = ["ftui-core/caps-probe"]
 default = ["caps-probe"]
+# Enable test-support to expose test infrastructure (locks, guards) to integration tests
+test-support = []
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 ftui-harness = { path = "../ftui-harness" }
